# dokku_storage (Resource)

Manages a named Dokku persistent storage entry (`dokku storage:create`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the storage entry.

### Optional

- `path` (String) Host path to back the storage entry. Defaults to Dokku's standard storage location if unset.

### Read-Only

- `host_path` (String) Resolved host path for this storage entry.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
